info.title: dtx
info.description: Install global or local tool. Local tools are added to manifest and restored.

options.name: --global
options.description:
Install the tool for the current user. [default:
False]

options.name: --local
options.description:
Install the tool and add to the local tool
manifest (default). [default: False]

options.name: --tool-path
options.description:
The directory where the tool will be installed.
The directory will be created if it does not
exist.

options.name: --version
options.description: The version of the tool package to install.

options.name: --configfile
options.description: The NuGet configuration file to use.

options.name: --tool-manifest
options.description: Path to the manifest file.

options.name: --add-source
options.description:
Add an additional NuGet package source to use
during installation.

options.name: --source
options.description:
Replace all NuGet package sources to use during
installation with these.

options.name: --framework
options.description: The target framework to install the tool for.

options.name: --prerelease
options.description: Include pre-release packages. [default: False]

options.name: --disable-parallel
options.description:
Prevent restoring multiple projects in parallel.
[default: False]

options.name: --ignore-failed-sources
options.description: Treat package source failures as warnings.

options.name: --no-http-cache
options.description: Do not cache packages and http requests.

options.name: --interactive
options.description:
Allows the command to stop and wait for user
input or action (for example to complete
authentication). [default: False]

options.name: --verbosity
options.description:
Set the MSBuild verbosity level. Allowed values
are q[uiet], m[inimal], n[ormal], d[etailed],
and diag[nostic]. [default: normal]

options.name: --allow-downgrade
options.description:
Allow package downgrade when installing a .NET
tool package. [default: False]

options.name: --arch
options.description: The target architecture.

options.name: --create-manifest-if-needed
options.description:
Create a tool manifest if one isn't found during
tool installation. For information on how
manifests are located, see
https://aka.ms/dotnet/tools/create-manifest-if-ne
eded [default: True]

options.name: --allow-roll-forward
options.description:
Allow a .NET tool to roll forward to newer
versions of the .NET runtime if the runtime it
targets isn't installed. [default: False]

options.name: --help
options.description: Show command line help.

arguments.name: PACKAGEID
arguments.description:
Package reference in the form of a package identifier like
'dotnetsay' or package identifier and version separated by '@'
like 'dotnetsay@2.1.7'.
